svg.title: MERA runtime loop: one invocation
svg.desc: One MERA runtime invocation. An input-only router or SkillBook template sends easy, checkable steps to a cheap model or a 1.5B student; a verifier checks the output and falls back to the strong model on failure. Cost savings come from the router and SkillBook; the reliability guarantee comes from the verifier, and the two are decoupled.

text.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Where cost savings (router / SkillBook) and reliability (verifier) each come from
